topic:approach_dropp_galinor.last_answer: The tavern runner leans closer, lowering their voice further. "Look, I didn’t say they were involved, but rumors swirl, and shadows linger. You’d best tread lightly. It’s not just the missing patrol; some say it’s connected to a deeper web of trouble. If you’re curious, find Lirael, the town crier. She might have more on the vanished patrol—if you can catch her before she’s whisked away by other matters. Just remember, not all whispers in this town are safe to follow."
